{{Enemy Infobox|Skulking Colony|2}}
'''Skulking Colony''' is an {{2|Elites|Elite}} {{2|Monsters|Enemy}} found in the {{2|Underdocks}}.

== Pattern ==
{{Intents|Skulking Colony|2}}
The Skulking Colony repeats the same four moves in order:
# {{Int|Skulking Colony|Smash||2}}
# {{Int|Skulking Colony|Zoom||2}}
# {{Int|Skulking Colony|Inertia||2}}
# {{Int|Skulking Colony|Piercing Stabs||2}}

== Notes ==

[[Category:Elites]]
[[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]

== Trivia ==
* Skulking Colony is male.<ref> "Additionally I found that the Dazed statuses actually worked against the design goals of his power" https://store.steampowered.com/news/app/2868840/view/507357499795439629?l=english</ref>

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.103.0 (BETA)'''
** Nerfed '''Skulking Colony''': HP reduced from 74(79) to 70(75)

* '''Early Access v0.102.0 (BETA)'''
** Buffed '''Skulking Colony''':
***Now attacks on all turns
***Deals slightly more damage

* '''Early Access v0.101.0 (BETA)'''
** Nerfed '''Skulking Colony''': deals less damage, damage scales slower, and no longer applies Dazed status cards

* '''Early Access v0.100.0 (BETA)'''
** Reworked '''Skulking Colony''' to have a deadlier moveset
** Lowered Hardened Shell to 15 and made Smash shuffle 5 Dazed instead of 4.

* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Skulking Colony to the game.
